nasb.text: Now the Lord said to Moses in Midian, “Go back to Egypt, for all the men who were seeking your life are dead.”

esv.text: And the Lord said to Moses in Midian, “Go back to Egypt, for all the men who were seeking your life are dead.”

cnv.text: 耶和華在米甸對摩西說：“你要起程，回到埃及去，因為那些尋索你命的人都死了。”

ccb.text: 耶和华在米甸对摩西说：“你只管放心回埃及去，想害你性命的人都已经死了。”
